---
title: "Skrub Tutorial Slides"
format: html
---

## Section 1: Introduction
- [Chapter 0: Introduction](chapters/00_intro.slides.html)

## Section 2: Exploring and sanitizing data
- [Chapter 1: Exploring Data](chapters/01_exploring_data.slides.html)
- [Chapter 2: Cleaning Data](chapters/02_cleaning_data.slides.html)
- Exercise 1


## Section 3: Transforming columns
- [Chapter 3: Column-specific transformations](chapters/03_feat_eng_apply.slides.html)
- [Chapter 4: Advanced column selection](chapters/04_selectors.slides.html)
- Exercise 2

## Section 4: Building a strong baseline
- [Chapter 5: Feature engineering with the TableVectorizer](chapters/05_table_vectorizer.slides.html)
- [Chapter 6: Strong ML baselines: `tabular_pipeline`](chapters/06_tabular_pipeline.slides.html)
- Exercise 3

## Section 5: Feature Engineering with skrub
- [Chapter 7: Skrub transformers for feature engineering](chapters/07_feature_eng_all.slides.html)
- Exercise 4 

## Section 6: Conclusion
- [Wrapping up](chapters/100_conclusion.qmd)
